nasb.text: if indeed you have heard of the stewardship of God’s grace which was given to me for you;

esv.text: assuming that you have heard of the stewardship of God’s grace that was given to me for you,

cnv.text: 想必你們聽過　神恩惠的計劃，他為你們的緣故賜恩給我，

ccb.text: 相信你们已经听说了，上帝委派我将祂的恩典传给你们。

csbs.text: 你们一定听说过，为了你们的缘故，神那恩典的任务已经赐给我了；
